changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.sql: create table if not exists gmdb.song ( id bigint generated always as identity not null, title varchar not null, details jsonb not null, album_id bigint null, constraint pk_song primary key (id), constraint uk_song_title_album unique (title, album_id), constraint fk_song_album foreign key (album_id) references gmdb.album (id) );

changeSet.author: p.meyer
p.meyer
